title: 都市修仙：外卖小哥的逆袭

frames.prompt: POV shot from a speeding electric scooter handle bars. Weaving dangerously through gridlocked traffic at sunset. Speed lines, motion blur. In the side mirror, a young delivery rider Chen Fan (24yo, blue uniform, buzz cut) gritting teeth, veins popping on forehead. High octane energy, cinematic lighting.
frames.description_cn: 电动车如针般穿过车流

frames.prompt: POV scooter riding, heavy traffic, sunset, Chen Fan reflection in mirror, intense focus.
frames.description_cn: 倒影显示汗水滴入眼睛

frames.prompt: Camera accelerates through narrow gap between two buses, horizon tilts aggressively.
frames.description_cn: 指关节因用力握把而发白

frames.prompt: Extreme close-up on Chen Fan's eyes. Reflection of a countdown timer turning RED in his pupil. Sweat beads roll down temple. Background is a streaking blur of city lights. High contrast, anxiety inducing.
Chen Fan eyes extreme close up, red digital numbers reflected in eye, sweat, blurred background.
Camera shakes with road vibration, focus locked on the panic in eyes.

Low angle shot from the asphalt up. A red supercar drifts around a corner, tires smoking, heading straight for the camera. In the foreground, a child's dropped teddy bear lies on the crosswalk. Sense of impending impact.
Red supercar drifting towards camera, low angle, teddy bear in foreground on asphalt.
Car looms larger rapidly, shadow engulfs the frame.

Slow motion. Chen Fan (blue uniform) is mid-air, body horizontal, diving between the car and a blurred small figure (the girl). His scooter crashes into a wall in the background. Debris floats in the air. Face twisted in exertion.
Chen Fan mid-air dive, slow motion, blue uniform, scooter crashing background, debris floating.
Character floats through frame, time frozen, hand reaching out.

Macro shot. Chen Fan's wrist slams onto the car hood. The jade pendant shatters. A drop of blood mixes with the green dust. Golden runes ignite from the blood mixture, spiraling up his arm. Magical realism.
Wrist hitting car hood, jade shattering, blood mixing, golden runes appearing on skin.
Impact causes dust shockwave, runes glow and travel up arm.

Dolly zoom (Vertigo effect) on Chen Fan's face. His buzz cut hair blows back from an invisible energy source. Eyes snap open - irises are molten gold. The panic is gone, replaced by terrifying calmness. Atmosphere shifts from warm sunset to cold blue.
Chen Fan face dolly zoom, eyes opening gold, hair blowing back, color grade shift to cold.
Background compresses while face remains constant, lighting shifts drastically.

Wide shot. The red supercar is crumpled like an accordion against Chen Fan's single hand. The car's rear wheels are suspended in the air. Chen Fan stands perfectly still, feet embedded in cracked asphalt. Steam rises from the car. Cinematic composition.
Chen Fan stopping car with one hand, car wrecked, rear wheels up, ground cracked, steam rising.
Static shot with drifting smoke and spinning car wheels.

Low angle medium shot looking up at Chen Fan. He slowly withdraws his hand, dusting off his blue uniform. He looks down at the driver with the indifference of a god looking at an ant. Golden glow in eyes fades but sharpness remains.
Chen Fan low angle, dusting off uniform, looking down with indifference, sharp eyes.
Hand swipes dust off shoulder, head tilts down slowly.

Handheld shaky cam. The Rich Second Gen (20s, flashy suit) kicks the jammed door open. He stumbles out, face red, veins popping. He ignores the miracle of his survival and stares at the scratches. Hysterical anger.
Rich kid kicking car door, stumbling out, angry face, pointing at car scratches.
Door forces open, character lunges towards camera/car.

OTS shot from behind the screaming Rich Kid. Chen Fan stands composed, hands behind his back, blue uniform fluttering in the wind. The contrast between the frantic rich kid and the statue-like Chen Fan is stark.
OTS rich kid pointing at Chen Fan, Chen Fan standing calm hands behind back, wind blowing uniform.
Rich kid gesticulates wildly, Chen Fan remains perfectly still.

POV from Chen Fan. The world turns grey/monochrome. A thick, black, skull-shaped mist (Death Qi) coils tightly around the Rich Kid's neck and forehead. The mist pulses like a heartbeat. Supernatural horror vibe.
POV monochrome world, black skull mist around rich kid's neck, pulsating mist.
frames.description_cn: 黑烟在富二代头上形成骷髅

frames.prompt: Black mist tightens, pulsating rhythmically.
Close-up. Chen Fan tilts his head slightly. The golden glow is gone, but his pupils are vertical slits for a split second. He smiles—a cold, terrifying smile that doesn't reach his eyes.
Chen Fan close up, head tilt, vertical pupils momentary, cold smile.
Slow push in on the smile.
Medium shot. The Rich Kid freezes mid-shout. His face drains of color instantly. He steps back, tripping over his own feet, terrified by an invisible pressure. He clutches his chest.
Rich kid freezing, face pale, stepping back, tripping, clutching chest, terrified.
Character stumbles backward, hand trembling as it raises to defend.
Insert shot. A cracked smartphone screen fills the frame. A bright red notification banner drops down: 'ORDER FAILED. DEDUCTION: 50 RMB'. The background is the asphalt road.
Phone screen close up, red notification banner 'Order Failed -50 RMB', cracked screen.
Notification banner animates down with a bounce.

Tracking shot. The god-like aura vanishes instantly. Chen Fan's face contorts into comic horror. He grabs his delivery box and sprints away from the camera at impossible speed, leaving a trail of dust. The rich kid is left confused in the foreground.
Chen Fan sprinting away panic, holding box, dust trail, rich kid confused foreground.
Camera pans rapidly to follow the runner, leaving the scene behind.
